record.summary: Replaces the chassis's placeholder Vue SPA with the control plane's real face: a Vite + React Router v7 single-page app served by the chassis web service from web/dist, same-origin with the API and the embedded rauthy IdP. v1 surface: login, tenant list/create, GitHub App install flow, stamp launcher + job progress, fleet table with operation buttons. The platform UI is deliberately NOT a template flavor: it owes nothing to template stack choices (thesis §3).
record.title: Governance UI: Vite + React Router v7 webapp
